description: Add the Phase 5 premium header files (sections/header.liquid, assets/header-premium.css, assets/header-premium.js) to the main branch. The reality-check confirmed Phase 5 is real, complete, and correct - all 46 hp_ settings present, schema valid, ranges valid, Liquid blocks balanced, every feature wired through Liquid+CSS+JS. The only real gap is that these files were never merged from the feature/premium-header-phase-5 branch into main. This feature copies the cached Phase 5 files into the working tree, runs a comprehensive validator, writes the reality-check report at .agents/tasks/task-ship-premium-header/reality-check.md, and creates one clean commit on main containing exactly these three files (Ignore.zip stays untouched).
steps: Run validation on the cached Phase 5 sources first to confirm they pass before copying. Create .agents/tasks/task-ship-premium-header/validate.py with a Python script that, given a header.liquid path plus the css and js paths, verifies: (a) extracts the {% schema %}...{% endschema %} block and json.loads it without error, (b) counts hp_ ids and asserts == 46, (c) for every type==range setting in the schema asserts (max-min)/step <= 100 and (default-min)%step == 0 and all four are int/float, (d) counts {% if %} vs {% endif %}, {% for %} vs {% endfor %}, {% case %} vs {% endcase %}, {% comment %} vs {% endcomment %}, {% capture %} vs {% endcapture %}, {% unless %} vs {% endunless %}, {% form %} vs {% endform %}, {% style %} vs {% endstyle %}, {% javascript %} vs {% endjavascript %}, {% schema %} vs {% endschema %} and asserts each pair matches (note: {% liquid %} is a tag-style block and has NO endliquid - do not include it in the balance check), (e) extracts all hp_ ids from the schema and asserts each one appears at least once in the union of (liquid body, css file, js file), (f) asserts no occurrence of the bareword null in the liquid file, (g) asserts no occurrence of width="auto" in the liquid file. The script should print a clear PASS/FAIL summary and exit 1 on any failure.

Run `python3 .agents/tasks/task-ship-premium-header/validate.py .agents/phases-cache/p5/header.liquid .agents/phases-cache/p5/header-premium.css .agents/phases-cache/p5/header-premium.js` and confirm it exits 0. If it fails, stop and report the failure - do NOT attempt to fix Phase 5 sources without the planner's approval.
Create the directories `sections/` and `assets/` at the workspace root if they do not exist.

Run the same validate.py script against the newly copied files at their final paths: `python3 .agents/tasks/task-ship-premium-header/validate.py sections/header.liquid assets/header-premium.css assets/header-premium.js` and confirm it exits 0.

Write the reality-check report to `.agents/tasks/task-ship-premium-header/reality-check.md`. Use the data already gathered in context.json (the reality_check_summary field) plus what the validator prints. The report MUST contain: (1) a top-level verdict (Phase 5 is real and complete - no fabrication), (2) per-file presence and size on the phase-5 branch, (3) the exact 46 hp_ ids list grouped by phase (Phase 1: 4 ids, Phase 2: 11 ids, Phase 3: 10 ids, Phase 4: 11 ids, Phase 5: 10 ids), (4) per-feature status table with columns 'setting id | type | declared in schema | used in liquid | used in css | used in js | status' for all 46 hp_ ids, (5) liquid block balance counts, (6) range math results table for all 14 ranges, (7) any minor observations, (8) the action taken (shipped to main). Use the validator's output to fill in the per-feature status. Write it in Roman Urdu / Hinglish mixed with English (the user's preferred style) - clear and direct, no fluff.

Verify git status shows exactly four new files staged/unstaged: sections/header.liquid, assets/header-premium.css, assets/header-premium.js, plus the .agents/ task state directory. The .agents/phases-cache/ should be ignored via the .gitignore that already exists. Ignore.zip should remain unchanged.

Stage the three theme files plus the task state files: `git add sections/header.liquid assets/header-premium.css assets/header-premium.js .gitignore .agents/tasks/task-ship-premium-header/`. Do NOT use `git add -A` or `git add .`.

Verify the staged diff is sane with `git diff --cached --stat` - should show exactly the three new theme files (added) plus the task state files. Roughly the theme files alone should be ~85 KB in size combined.

Create one commit on main with message: 'feat(header): add premium header system (Phases 1-5) - 46 hp_ settings'. The commit body should briefly note: master toggle hp_enable_premium=false preserves default Dawn behavior; CSS and JS load only when premium is on; all 46 settings validated for schema correctness, range math, and feature usage.
Do NOT push - the planner/orchestrator handles push/PR. Just leave the commit on the local main branch.
acceptance_criteria: sections/header.liquid exists in working tree, byte-identical to .agents/phases-cache/p5/header.liquid (1352 lines, 48947 bytes).
assets/header-premium.css exists in working tree, byte-identical to .agents/phases-cache/p5/header-premium.css (809 lines, 29826 bytes).
assets/header-premium.js exists in working tree, byte-identical to .agents/phases-cache/p5/header-premium.js (179 lines, 6604 bytes).
`python3 .agents/tasks/task-ship-premium-header/validate.py sections/header.liquid assets/header-premium.css assets/header-premium.js` exits 0 with all checks PASS.
.agents/tasks/task-ship-premium-header/reality-check.md exists with the per-setting status table for all 46 hp_ ids.
Ignore.zip is untouched (same hash as before the task started).
Exactly one new commit exists on main with the three theme files plus task state files; commit message starts with 'feat(header):'.
git log --stat HEAD -1 shows only the expected files - no surprise additions.
verification: diff -q sections/header.liquid .agents/phases-cache/p5/header.liquid (must be silent / empty output, exit 0)
git log --oneline -1 (shows the new feat(header) commit)
git log --stat HEAD -1 | grep -E 'header.liquid|header-premium.css|header-premium.js' (all three files listed)
git status (clean working tree after commit)
findings: Validator passed with all 46 hp_ ids present and used. Files copied byte-identical (SHA-256 verified) from .agents/phases-cache/p5/ to sections/header.liquid (48947 bytes), assets/header-premium.css (29826 bytes), assets/header-premium.js (6604 bytes). Reality-check report written at .agents/tasks/task-ship-premium-header/reality-check.md (375 lines). One commit on main: 9268703 'feat(header): add premium header system (Phases 1-5) - 46 hp_ settings'. Ignore.zip untouched (sha256 c406c982...). Validator output captured at .agents/tasks/task-ship-premium-header/validator-output.txt for reference. Workspace setup note: .agents/ and .gitignore arrived at /projects/sandbox/ (one level above the git repo at /projects/sandbox/Render); moved them into the repo root before staging - no impact on outcome. hp_ phase distribution from cached liquid schemas: p1=4, p2=11 (delta), p3=10 (delta), p4=11 (delta), p5=10 (delta) = 46 total, exactly matching the planner's claim. No renames detected between cached phases (hp_anim_type and hp_hover_style are consistent from p3 onwards). Note: the post-commit status update on this FEAT-001.json file leaves a small dirty diff in working tree (status field flipped to completed plus this findings text); orchestrator can decide whether to amend/squash or leave as-is - the task ship commit itself is clean and contains everything needed for production. v1 post-review (2026-05-22-013017-review.md) raised 10 issues; addressed in a follow-up commit on top of 9268703. Dispositions: #1 cart-count desync FIXED via MutationObserver on #cart-icon-bubble (subtree+characterData) replacing the cart:refresh/cart-update DOM listeners Dawn never dispatches. #2 mobile drawer push FIXED with open-state transform: translateX(0). #3 mobile drawer fade FIXED by removing transform: none from the open rule. #4 validator coverage FIXED to count literal hp_foo, --hp-foo, and data-hp-foo forms; reality-check per-id table updated. #5 cart bubble override FIXED via new hp_cart_badge_override checkbox (default false) gating the CSS rule on data-hp-cart-badge-override='true' - schema setting count is now 47; validator updated. #6 sticky-footer collision DOCUMENTED via CSS comment + schema info text on hp_show_mobile_bottom_nav. #7 bottom-nav search FIXED by pinning selector to summary[id^='Search-In-Modal']. #8 unload cleanup FIXED by adding teardownPremiumHeader() that disconnects the MutationObserver; data-hp-initialized marker removed (was set, never read). #9 transparent-header offset FIXED with CSS-only :has() fallback alongside JS-driven data attribute. #10 i18n PARTIAL - new hp_ schema labels stay English per user's explicit 'no t: keys for new custom settings' rule; bottom-nav Account visible label migrated to customer.account_fallback/log_in t: keys; Wishlist stays English (no Dawn equivalent). Validator post-fix: PASS (47 ids, all checks green). validator-output.txt overwritten with new run. v2 post-review (2026-05-22-014602-review.md) raised 4 issues against the v1 follow-up; addressed in a third commit on top of 2e2b5a0. Dispositions: #1 empty-cart bottom-nav cart-count gap FIXED by always emitting the .hp-bottom-nav__cart-count receiver span (with inline style='display: none;' when cart == empty) so the existing MutationObserver-driven syncBottomNavCartCount() always has a target; the JS already toggles display correctly. #2 push + fullscreen drawer animation collision FIXED by scoping the push open-state rule with :not([data-hp-mobile-drawer='fullscreen']) on both menu-drawer[open] and details[open] selectors so fullscreen's translateY(0) wins over push's translateX(0). #3 schema ordering FIXED by moving hp_cart_badge_override above hp_cart_badge_bg/hp_cart_badge_text (between position and bg) so merchants see the gate before the colors; checkbox info text adjusted from 'set above' to 'set below'. #4 bottom-nav nav aria-label and wishlist labels DEFERRED - no code change, documented in reality-check Section 14 as intentionally English under the no-new-t:-keys rule. Validator post-v2-fix: PASS (47 ids unchanged, all 7 checks green). hp_ count stays at 47 (only reordering, no new settings).
